info.title: NuGet License Collector
info.description: A .NET global tool to collect and analyze NuGet package licenses across .NET solutions and projects. Generates comprehensive license reports in text or JSON format with intelligent caching for performance.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: NuGet License Collector - Analyze NuGet package licenses in a solution or project

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Path to the solution file (.sln) or project file (.csproj, .vbproj)
